data.title: Strive CEO pushes MSCI to reconsider Bitcoin exclusion policy, advocating for market-driven decisions on including Bitcoin companies.
data.description: The CEO of Strive, Matt Cole, has called on the MSCI to allow the market to determine the inclusion of companies holding Bitcoin in their passive investment strategies.

data.title: SRN Advisors reorganizes DFND ETF into DIVCON Leaders ETF, effective immediately. (Total ETFs involved: 2)
data.description: SRN Advisors, LLC (SRN) of Huntingdon Valley, Pennsylvania, disclosed on December 5, 2025, that the Siren DIVCON Dividend Defender ETF (CBOE: DFND), an ETF under their management, is set to undergo a reorganization. The fund will merge with the Siren DIVCON Leaders Dividend ETF (CBOE: [new ticker symbol]). This move marks a strategic shift within SRN's ETF offerings.

data.title: PCs for People's cofounder and CEO Casey Sorensen is leaving after 18 years of leading the nonprofit, effective Dec 26, 2025.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in St. Paul, Minnesota, PCs FOR PEOPLE made public the departure of its Cofounder and CEO, Casey Sorensen, effective December 26, 2025. Sorensen, who has been with the nonprofit since 2008, transformed the concept of providing computers to low-income households into a reality.

data.title: Douglas Emmett (NYSE: DEI) announces $0.19 quarterly cash dividend per share ($0.76 annual) to be paid on Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: Douglas Emmett, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.19 per share of common stock, amounting to $0.76 annually. The dividend will be paid on January 15, 2026, to shareholders of record as of December 31, 2025. Douglas Emmett, Inc., a real estate investment trust (REIT), is fully integrated, self-administered, and self-managed.

data.title: ORIC presents promising data for Enozertinib at ESMO Asia with 67% ORR in 1L NSCLC patients with EGFR Exon 20 mutations.
data.description: Initial results have shown a significant 67% objective response rate and a perfect 100% objective response rate within the brain (determined by BICR-RANO) in patients being treated with a first-line systemic treatment. Notably, these positive outcomes were observed even in individuals with ongoing brain metastases.

data.title: CEO: Strategy secures $1.44B to combat 'FUD' during Bitcoin downturn; raised 21m dividend funds in 8 days to ease investor worry.
data.description: The CEO of Strategy, Phong Le, announced that the firm was able to secure enough funds to cover dividends for the next 21 months in only eight days, aiming to address concerns among investors.

data.title: AI-generated scams targeting lipedema patients exposed by TODAY Show investigation with fabricated videos and fake experts.
data.description: In Los Angeles on December 5, 2025, a concerning rise in AI-generated deepfake scams on social media has been observed. These scams utilize fabricated videos, synthetic voices, and bogus medical professionals to endorse unverified treatments. A recent investigation by the TODAY Show titled "Deepfake Medical Product Ads" uncovered the prevalence of these misleading schemes. This trend is quickly gaining traction, with a significant number of individuals being targeted and misled by these sophisticated fraudulent tactics.

data.title: Copper Quest completes $1.9M private placement, not available for US distribution.
data.description: Do not distribute to US newswire services or share in the US.

data.title: Strutt, CES 2026 winner, starts pre-orders with Super Early Bird access. Launching at CES 2026. Located in Singapore.
data.description: A robotics company that has won awards has begun accepting pre-orders before its official launch at CES 2026. Based in Singapore, Strutt is introducing smart everyday vehicle technology. The company started offering Super Early Bird access to interested customers on December 5, 2025.

data.title: Lattice Semiconductor wins 2025 Global Semiconductor Alliance Award for 'Most Respected Public Semiconductor Company'. #LSCC #GSA
data.description: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC) was recently named the 'Most Respected Public Semiconductor Company' at the 2025 Global Semiconductor Alliance (GSA) Awards. This award acknowledges companies in the industry for their achievements, forward-thinking vision, strategy, and future potential. The voting for the award was done by GSA members. Lattice Semiconductor, known for its low power programmable technology, is honored to have received this prestigious recognition.

data.title: Braemar Hotels & Resorts moves 2025 Annual Meeting from in-person to virtual format via webcast.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. (NYSE: BHR) disclosed that its 2025 Annual Meeting of Stockholders will transition from an in-person gathering to a virtual event streamed online. This move aims to adapt to the circumstances and ensure the safety of participants. The change in format was made due to unforeseen circumstances. The company cited the shift to a live webcast format for the Annual Meeting.

data.title: Schweiger Dermatology Group offers same-week appointments, and advanced skin cancer treatment; announces a landmark year of growth and innovation with 2.5 million patients served.
data.description: In New York on December 5, 2025, Schweiger Dermatology Group revealed a highly successful year marked by substantial growth, pioneering advancements in skin cancer treatment, and exceptional patient availability. As one of the leading dermatology practices in the country, the group has experienced rapid expansion, boasting over 2.5...

data.title: Children's education franchise COMPUCHILD expands into Campbell and Monte Sereno, Santa Clara County, after success in Los Gatos and Saratoga; Dublin-based COMPUCHILD offers STEAM programs for kids, as per Dec 5, 2025 press release.
data.description: A franchisee in Los Gatos and Saratoga has expanded their territory to include Campbell and Monte Sereno following a successful first year. COMPUCHILD, a top provider of Entrepreneurial STEAM™ after-school education programs for kids, made the announcement on December 5, 2025 from Dublin, California. The expansion comes after notable achievements in the initial year of operation.
Crypto treasury underwriter Clear Street plans to list in new year

data.title: HNI Corporation's exchange offer for Steelcase, Inc. notes expired, offering up to $450M in new HNI Notes.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, HNI Corporation revealed their acquisition of Steelcase, Inc. that was announced on August 4, 2025. The deal, conducted in a mix of cash and stock, is a significant move marked by a definitive agreement between the two companies. As part of this acquisition, HNI initiated an exchange offer for all existing 5.125% Notes due 2029 from Steelcase. The offer allows for the exchange of these notes for new notes from HNI, with a total value of up to $450,000,000 in aggregate principal amount. This acquisition marks a strategic development in the business world, as two major corporations solidify their partnership in a lucrative deal.

data.title: AMC transferred the majority of its equity in Hycroft Mining to Sprott Mining for $24.1 million.
data.description: In Leawood, Kansas, AMC Entertainment Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: AMC) has finalized a deal transferring the majority of its equity investment in Hycroft Mining Holding Corporation (Nasdaq: HYMC) to Sprott Mining, a Canadian corporation owned by renowned gold and silver investor Eric Sprott. AMC sold around 2.34 million shares of Hycroft common stock in this private transaction.

Tesla plans for more than 1,000 EV chargers across Japan by 2027

data.title: Nektar Therapeutics granted 18,310 stock options to two individuals under Nasdaq listing rule.
data.description: In San Francisco on December 5, 2025, Nektar Therapeutics revealed that the Organization and Compensation Committee of Nektar's Board of Directors has provided non-qualified stock options for the purchase of a total of 18,310 shares of its common stock to two individuals. This grant was made under the NASDAQ symbol NKTR.
